introduction in c minor (Grave), dotted-rhythm chords, rhetorical pauses, chromatic harmony; returns at bars 135–138, 297–300"},{"id":"Allegro-T1","bar_start":11,"bar_end":26,"description":"Stormy first theme, c minor; unison/octave C tremolo bass under descending sixths in right hand; driven, fortepiano dynamic outbursts"},{"id":"Allegro-Trans","bar_start":27,"bar_end":50,"description":"Transition passage modulating from c minor toward E♭ major; lyrical G-major/B♭ chord sequences, sequential descent"},{"id":"Allegro-T2","bar_start":51,"bar_end":88,"description":"Lyrical second theme in E♭ major; sustained bass B♭, melodic right-hand arabesques with trills and ornamental figures"},{"id":"Closing-Exp","bar_start":89,"bar_end":132,"description":"Closing/cadential theme of exposition in E♭ major; repeated figuration, ascending scalar passages, confirmed PAC at bar 131–132"},{"id":"Development-Core","bar_start":139,"bar_end":196,"description":"Development in E major then sequential modulation through D, F, G minor; tremolo bass, arpeggiated figurations, dominant preparation on G"},{"id":"Recap-T1","bar_start":197,"bar_end":220,"description":"Recapitulation of first theme, c minor, essentially parallel to exposition"},{"id":"Recap-T2","bar_start":255,"bar_end":286,"description":"Recapitulation of second theme transposed to C major/minor; bass in C, melodic arabesques parallel to exposition"},{"id":"Coda","bar_start":301,"bar_end":312,"description":"Final coda in c minor (Allegro); restatement of T1 material, strong cadential progressions, final tonic close"}]}
